response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and founding GISCollective. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure at scale — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. The seniority level (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated experience architecting growth/measurement systems used across multiple teams falls short of IC6 expectations.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby: millions of req/s)
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/mentoring via workshops
Full-stack proficiency in required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C/C++) plus relevant infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management
No evidence of metrics/telemetry platform work or statistical analysis for experiment quality and bias detection
Career trajectory at Senior/Staff level; lacks the cross-org Principal/IC6 scope of architecting systems used across multiple product teams
